title: The Coming of Amos
writer: James Ashmore Creelman, Garrett Fort, William J. Locke
actors: Rod La Rocque, Jetta Goudal, Noah Beery
plot: An Australian sheep rancher fulfills his promise to his dying mother by visiting his uncle on the French Riviera. He meets and falls in love with a Russian princess who was forced into a bad marriage to save her family from the Co...
